name: 15.38 fl oz Ribbed Glass Tumbler - Bullseye's Playground™
description: Sip in style with the 15.38 fl oz Ribbed Glass Tumbler from Bullseye's Playground. Crafted from clear glass with a bamboo lid, this tumbler offers a sleek design perfect for any occasion. Its ribbed texture adds a touch of elegance, while the included straw makes it convenient for on-the-go hydration. With a height of 8.5 inches, it's a great addition to your drinkware collection.
